consumer_contexts: single-player local save slots with schema evolution and recovery
reusable settings, inventory, progression, and authored-state repositories
common_kernel: versioned envelopes and explicit serialization boundaries
staged writes, commit, recovery candidates, and prior-record preservation
configurable_variation: serialization format, storage provider, slot policy, compression, encryption, cloud sync, and retention
excluded_project_specific: one game's save DTOs, progression model, slot names, screen flow, and content taxonomy
consumer credentials, account services, private cloud endpoints, and machine-local paths
rationale: Reliable save, recovery, versioning, and provider boundaries recur across games and reusable subsystems; consumer state schemas and storage services remain outside the shared mechanics.
non_claims: Admission does not claim crash durability, security, cloud synchronization, or filesystem behavior beyond a separately verified exact profile.
